name: Tashikani
developer: Game for IT, Inc., HIKO Game
short_description: Line up numbers to make 10 in this falling block puzzle game!
detailed_description:
Line up numbers to make 10 in this falling block puzzle game!

A Player is the crab that drops numbered blocks. Line up them vertically and horizontally to create multiples of 10.

  • Unique gameplay with a mathematical twist on the falling block puzzle.
  • Some stages include short tasks and tutorial elements.
  • Enjoy long hours of engaging gameplay as you play strategically.
  • "Kani" means crab in Japanese, and "Tashi" means addition. But "Tashikani" means "sure"!! (It's a pun.)

Create larger numbers and dive deeper into the ocean!
